description: Use this API to return an array of real values for Time Series Power Flow profile data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr, rarray, pdcount = gettspfprofiledata(curvesetid,curvecol)

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of COUNT elements specifying Is an array of at least COUNT elements. (output).

return_values.name: pdcount
return_values.description: Number of elements in rarray that are set by this api. pdcount is identical to the value of pdcount returned by the gettspfprofiledatacount api when it is called. (output).
